commands: echo CHECK_WORKSPACE; ls /build/workspace/HyperMageVR/UnrealProject/ 2>&1 | head -5 || echo NO_CLONE_YET; echo CHECK_GAMELIFT; ls /opt/GameLiftSDK/ 2>&1 | head -10; echo RUN_SETUP; cd /opt/GameLiftSDK && bash setup.sh 2>&1 | tail -5; echo SETUP_EXIT:$?; echo CHECK_UPLUGIN; find /opt/GameLiftSDK -name GameLiftServerSDK.uplugin 2>/dev/null || echo NOT_FOUND; echo DONE
